rationale: Re-assert each consequence of the conjoined `swap_spec` hypothesis as a tautological implication: `put_spec` pins both `post*_self_.epmap@` to the same `pre_self_.epmap@.insert(src@, pre_ack_state)` (added both directly and via `=~=` for Map extensionality), and the `get_spec` match pins both `post*_ack_state` to the same witness, giving full-struct and per-field `CAckState` equality. This hands z3 a single named version of each cross-run equality so the triggers from the two `swap_spec` instances line up without re-instantiating `Map::insert`.
